violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave by the stand up freezer needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The outside of the soda dispenser in the lobby needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the fryers have excess debris and need to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a daily basis to ensure proper chemical sanitizing concentrations are maintained in facility.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware-washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine not testing for chemical sanitizing.--Ware-wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. All three chemical pumps operate after cycle stops. Service dish machine as required. Replace empty chemical bottles providing chemical for dish machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pooling water in walk in cooler from dripping at compressor mounting bolt. Service leak.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
